name: shikha Tech
title: Building the Next Generation of Engineers
tagline: With over a decade of experience in building scalable architectures and leading high-performance engineering teams, I am on a mission to democratize advanced tech education. I believe in writing code that matters and teaching concepts that build careers.
bio: My journey in software engineering started with a simple curiosity about how things work on the web, which quickly evolved into a lifelong passion for distributed systems and clean code architecture. Over the years, I've had the privilege of architecting solutions for Fortune 500 companies and fast-growing startups alike.

philosophy.title: Redefining Learning
philosophy.paragraph: To transform the way the world learns programming by turning boring lectures into visually stunning, cinematic educational experiences that inspire creativity and drive real-world impact.

story.heading: Story of Curiosity to Architecture
story.content:
What started as a simple curiosity about how the web works quickly evolved into a lifelong passion for distributed systems and clean code architecture. After years of architecting solutions for fast-growing startups and enterprises, a massive gap became evident between traditional academic teachings and the unvarnished realities of the tech industry.

That realization birthed this platform—a dedicated space to share battle-tested knowledge, practical engineering skills, and industry truths. Today, we are proud to be shaping the careers of countless developers, turning complex algorithms into compelling visual narratives and passion into purpose.

mission.title: Democratizing Tech
mission.description: Kanha started with coding guidelines in 2015, seeking to make raw systems design and deployment concepts accessible to everyone.

vision.title: Cinematic Syllabus
vision.description: Pioneering the border of virtual reality and education. Kanha believes engineering courses should feel visual, beautiful, and interactive.

coreValues.title: Quality Benchmarks
coreValues.description: We commit to strict developer standards, real-world sandboxed container instances, and active recruiter links.

experience.description: Spearheading the development of immersive, high-quality engineering tutorials. Designing core curriculum, managing platform architecture, and leading a vibrant community of passionate learners.

achievements.title: Reached 1 Million Global Learners
achievements.description: Successfully crossed the milestone of educating over one million aspiring developers globally through our interactive, cinematic tech courses.

achievements.title: Reached 1 Million Global Learners
achievements.description: Successfully crossed the milestone of educating over one million aspiring developers globally through our interactive, cinematic tech courses.

futureGoals.headline: Scaling Global Tech Literacy
futureGoals.paragraph1: Our ultimate goal is to make enterprise-grade software engineering education completely accessible. By expanding our interactive virtual sandboxes and partnering with major tech ecosystems, we plan to empower 5 million new developers by the year 2030.
futureGoals.paragraph2: By 2030, we plan to partner with over 500 universities worldwide, integrating our cinematic syllabus into traditional computer science degrees and launching the careers of a million new developers.

coreCollaboratorsList.name: Sarah Jenkins
coreCollaboratorsList.description: With 15+ years of software engineering experience, Sarah ensures our cinematic tech courses meet strict enterprise and Ivy League standards.
